intent: Write a deep-dive on 'hair care products and the gap between marketing and forum experience'. (1) One Stop Market shopping site — browse the beauty-personal-care category and collect at least 4 hair-care products (shampoo, conditioner, oil/serum, tool). Record name, price, rating, review count. (2) Reddit — browse /f/TwoXChromosomes AND /f/AskReddit for posts on hair-care product disappointment, ingredient skepticism, or brand loyalty. Collect at least 3 posts with title, score, comment count. The report must: (a) present 4 storefront picks, (b) map each to its nearest community commentary, (c) flag products whose marketing is most questioned, (d) close with a trust-weighted top 2. Cite every claim.
author_notes: Medium tier. Marketing vs forum disconnect in hair-care.
